# Copilot Repository Instructions (AEHF)

## Mandatory behavior

- Preserve existing behavior unless a change is intentional and documented.
- Prefer incremental change over rewrite.
- Classify task depth before proposing artifacts.
- Update docs/specs/changelog when behavior or architecture changes.
- Surface assumptions explicitly; do not infer certainty without evidence.

## Delivery rules

- Use `docs/` as durable source of truth.
- Use `specs/` as per-change execution package.
- Use `prompts/` as reusable operational instructions.
- Escalate to human validation when risk or ambiguity is high.
